offer.what: Digital marketing services including SEO, video marketing, lead generation, and social media management
offer.coreOutcome: More online visibility and a steady stream of inbound leads that turn into paying customers
offer.pricePoint: unknown — custom quotes; likely $500–$2,000/mo retainer typical for boutique agencies at this scale
offer.commitment: Monthly retainer (inferred); no public pricing tiers found

audience.icp: Small-to-medium local or online businesses that have a product/service worth selling but lack the digital presence or expertise to generate consistent leads online
painPoints: Invisible on Google — losing customers to competitors who rank higher
Tried running ads or posting on social but saw no ROI
No time or in-house expertise to manage digital marketing
Unclear how to turn online attention into actual sales
segments: Local service businesses (restaurants, contractors, salons, healthcare) needing local SEO
Online businesses/e-commerce needing social media growth and lead gen
Entrepreneurs and founders who are good at their trade but not at marketing

salesCycle.trial: Free discovery/strategy call (primary CTA on site: 'Schedule a call with our experts')
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Consultation call → custom proposal → retainer agreement
salesCycle.topObjection: Skepticism about ROI — 'We've paid for marketing before and it didn't work'

ahaMoment: Client sees their first meaningful organic ranking improvement or their first inbound lead attributed to Ray Media's work — typically within 30–60 days for quick-win tactics

retention.recurring: Monthly retainer (SEO and social management are inherently ongoing)
retention.expansion: Upsell from single-service (SEO only) to bundled packages (SEO + video + social); increase content volume or ad spend management
retention.churnRisk: Slow early results — SEO takes 3–6 months to show meaningful lift; clients may disengage before the payoff

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — no evidence of a structured onboarding email sequence
Lead-Magnet Nurture — no known lead magnets; all capture goes straight to consult CTA
Trial/Consult Conversion — no drip sequence evident for leads who booked but didn't convert
Booking Reminders & No-Show Recovery — no evidence of automated pre-call or post-no-show follow-up
Value Newsletter — no evidence of a regular educational email to the list
Renewal & Expansion — no evidence of upsell/anniversary touchpoints
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — no evidence of a lapsed-client reactivation flow
toneVoice: Confident and results-focused but accessible — speaks plainly to business owners who are not marketers. Avoids jargon; leads with outcomes ('more leads', 'get seen') over process ('keyword density', 'engagement metrics'). Entrepreneurial energy, not corporate polish.
compliance: Standard CAN-SPAM and GDPR requirements. No special vertical compliance (no healthcare, finance, or legal content on the core service pages).
